name: standards fetcher: source with fragility_tier:medium + fragility_strategy:prompt-on-change prompts when upstream structure delta exceeds 5%
command:
mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache && printf "h1
h2
h3
h4
h5
h6
h7
h8
h9
h10
" > .claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache/src-1.html && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetcher.sh" --source-id src-1 --fragility-tier medium --strategy prompt-on-change --upstream-stub "$PWD/upstream.sh" --cache "$PWD/.claude-tdd-pro/standards-cache" --no-confirm-default 2>out.txt && grep "structure delta" out.txt 1>&2 && grep "prompt required" out.txt 1>&2 && echo ok 1>&2
setup:
printf '#!/bin/bash
for i in $(seq 1 20); do echo h$i; done
exit 0
' > upstream.sh && chmod +x upstream.sh
